note: Human-readable release notes the desktop shows in Settings → Advanced → Version. Newest first. Set "critical": true on a release that fixes data loss, a security issue, or a breaking sync change so it is called out prominently and the desktop can nudge harder.

entries.headline: Share media in meetings + opt-in updates
notes: Fixed: sharing a large video in a meeting now loads fully for guests (big shared files were silently truncated in transit).
Updates are now opt-in — your computer no longer refreshes itself in the background. A plain reload always keeps your current version; update when you choose from Settings → Advanced → Version.
The "Erase This Computer" button moved deep into Advanced settings so it can't be tapped by accident.
My Media: smaller interface, live recording preview, front/back camera flip, and guests can play videos you mark visible.

entries.headline: Pre-launch test build
notes: An earlier pre-launch build, kept for testing and rollback. Your files and data carry across versions (migrations are additive), so switching between builds is safe and reversible.
